creator: jdhardwi@learn.senecac.on.ca
text:
it says in section 4.6.1.6 of the manual on the web that 
/usr/ports/distfiles " ...is symlinked to the CDROM", but the 
output of an ls -ld shows this is not so:

home/Mort%ls -ld /usr/ports/distfiles/
drwxr-xr-x  3 root  wheel  1024 Dec  3 16:54 /usr/ports/distfiles/

Fix: 

correct the document
How-To-Repeat: see above
